turns.content: Radiohead is without question my favorite band. I have seen them live six times.
Six times! You are a dedicated fan. What is your favorite era of their work?
OK Computer is the perfect album in my opinion. Every track is extraordinary.
OK Computer is widely considered one of the greatest albums ever made.
I actually play guitar myself. Trying to learn some of the Jonny Greenwood parts.
Jonny Greenwood's guitar work is incredibly complex. How long have you been playing?
About ten years. I will never sound like him but it is fun to try.
Live music will always beat recordings for me too. Do you go to many concerts?
As many as I can. Live music beats recordings every single time — the energy is unmatched. Country music is the one genre I truly cannot stand though.
Interesting contrast — experimental rock devotee who dislikes country. Not uncommon!
